---
name: Language Module Request
about: Request support for a language not currently supported by OmniFormatter
title: "feat(lang-<name>): add support for <language>"
labels: ["language-request"]
assignees: []
---

## Language

<!-- The full name of the language. e.g. Zig, Gleam, WGSL -->

## VS Code Language ID

<!-- The exact VS Code language identifier. e.g. "zig", "gleam", "wgsl" -->

## File Extensions

<!-- All file extensions associated with this language. e.g. .zig, .gleam, .wgsl -->

## Reference Formatter

<!-- The canonical, official formatter for this language. e.g. `zig fmt`, `gleam format`.
     OmniFormatter aims for byte-for-byte output parity with the canonical formatter. -->

## Why This Language Should Be Supported

<!-- Brief justification. How widely used is it? Is it in growing demand? -->

## Are You Willing to Implement This?

- [ ] Yes — I plan to implement this module and submit it to the registry.
- [ ] No — I am requesting that someone else implement it.

## Additional Context

<!-- Links to the language's official formatter, Tree-sitter grammar repository, or any other relevant resources. -->
